solution:
```
class Codec:
    def __init__(self):
        self.url_map = {}
        self.counter = 0

    def encode(self, longUrl: str) -> str:
        """Encodes a URL to a shortened URL."""
        if longUrl not in self.url_map:
            self.url_map[longUrl] = f"http://tinyurl.com/{self.counter}"
            self.url_map[f"http://tinyurl.com/{self.counter}"] = longUrl
            self.counter += 1
        return self.url_map[longUrl]

    def decode(self, shortUrl: str) -> str:
        """Decodes a shortened URL to its original URL."""
        return self.url_map[shortUrl]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses a hashmap to store the mapping between long URLs and short URLs, allowing for constant-time encoding and decoding.
